problem.title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
problem.description: Design an algorithm to serialize and deserialize a binary tree. There is no restriction on how your serialization/deserialization algorithm should work. You just need to ensure that a binary tree can be serialized to a string and this string can be deserialized to the original tree structure.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Preorder with Null Markers
solutions.description: Use preorder (root-left-right) traversal to serialize the tree, inserting 'null' markers for missing children so the structure can be fully reconstructed. During deserialization, a shared index pointer advances through the split token array, recursively rebuilding each node in the same preorder sequence. The key insight is that preorder naturally encodes parent-child relationships when null positions are explicitly marked.
